description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image guoren83/ubuntu-16.04-buildroot:v1, define variables CHIP_PREFIX, CONFIG_NAME, CPU_ID, MAIN, PREFIX, SUFFIX, VENDOR_ID and a cache path dl/, and two stages: build and test. In the build stage add the jobs 9xx_5.10_glibc_compat and 9xxf_5.10_glibc_enhanced that run a before_script extracting CPU_ID, VENDOR_ID, PREFIX, HELL and MAIN from CI_BUILD_NAME, then execute the script: echo 'Configure buildroot'; CONFIG_NAME=${PREFIX}${MAIN}${SUFFIX}; export GITLAB_CI_JOB_ID=${CI_JOB_ID}; echo ${CONFIG_NAME}; echo 'Build buildroot'; make CONF=${CONFIG_NAME} O=output > >(tee build.log |grep '>>>') 2>&1 || { echo 'Failed build last output'; tail -200 build.log; xz -z build.log; exit 1; }; xz -z build.log; if [ -f output/images/vmlinux ]; then output/host/bin/csky-linux-strip -sg output/images/vmlinux; xz -z output/images/vmlinux; fi; if [ -f output/images/Image ]; then xz -z output/images/Image; fi; if [ -f output/images/usb.img ]; then xz -z output/images/usb.img; fi; if [ -f output/images/rootfs.ext2 ]; then xz -z output/images/rootfs.ext2; fi; if [ -f output/images/rootfs.cpio ]; then rm -f output/images/rootfs.cpio; fi; if [ -f output/images/rootfs.tar ]; then xz -z output/images/rootfs.tar; fi; if [ -d output/images/hw ]; then cd output/images/; tar czf hw.tar.gz hw; cd -; fi, and always publish artifacts output/images/ and build.log.xz with a 2‑week expiration. In the test stage add the jobs 9xx_5.10_glibc_qemu_test and 9xxf_5.10_glibc_qemu_test_enhanced that depend on their respective build jobs, run a before_script setting RUN="run_test_qemu_riscv64.sh", then execute the script: echo 'Prepare to run'; mkdir -p output/host/; tar -xf output/images/toolchain_*.tar.xz -C output/host; if [ -f output/images/vmlinux.xz ]; then xz -d output/images/vmlinux.xz; fi; if [ -f output/images/Image.xz ]; then xz -d output/images/Image.xz; fi; if [ -f output/images/rootfs.ext2.xz ]; then xz -d output/images/rootfs.ext2.xz; fi; if [ -f output/images/rootfs.tar.xz ]; then xz -d output/images/rootfs.tar.xz; fi; if [ -f output/host/csky-ci/${RUN} ]; then ./output/host/csky-ci/${RUN} $BOARD $CORENUM; fi; if [ -f output/host/csky-ci/generic_analyze.sh ]; then ./output/host/csky-ci/generic_analyze.sh || exit 1; fi; if [ -f output/host/csky-glibc-ci/csky-glibc-ci.sh ]; then ./output/host/csky-glibc-ci/csky-glibc-ci.sh || exit 1; fi, and always upload the test.log artifact with a 2‑week expiration.
